case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL VS RAMSEY, CANDACE C.

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT RAMSEY, CANDACE C.

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION AUG-25-2004, CONTINUED BY COURT TO FEB-25-2005 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 FOR PROOF ON PAYMENTS. IF NO APPEARANCES, CASE CONTINUED FOR 6 MOS. INTEVALS UNTIL PAID OFF AT WHICH TIME CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE.
